<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />

  <link rel="stylesheet" href="uds/uds.css" />
  <script type="module" src="web-components.js"></script>
  <title>badge</title>

<body>
<udc-badge tone="success">Active</udc-badge>

</html>
